overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player traverses a wet neon-lit plaza, passes through security gates, explores a market area beneath a towering corporate building, and emerges onto a busy street with traffic.

events.description: approaching and entering the security gate with yellow warning lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-soaked plaza towards a security checkpoint

entered.detail: reflective wet tiled ground surface with rain puddles
metal gate structure with bright yellow warning lights and danger signs
large illuminated billboard spanning across the plaza entrance
tall cyberpunk style buildings with illuminated windows
tall palm trees lining the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked plaza in Night City at night. The camera moves forward through wet reflective pavement towards a security gate with bright yellow danger lights. Neon billboards and futuristic buildings line the plaza while palm trees are visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: market plaza with food vendors beneath corporate tower

events.description: exiting the security gate into the market plaza area
camera tilts upward to reveal the towering NC corporate building

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area and looking up at the massive NC building

notable_agents.action: person in teal jacket taking a photo with their phone
people sitting at outdoor dining tables eating and conversing

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with illuminated NC logo on the facade
market stalls with warm lighting and vendors selling goods
tables and chairs with people seated eating
vertical digital advertisement screen showing political figure
elevated highway structure visible above the plaza

segments.scene_description: Passing through the security gate, the scene opens into a bustling market plaza. Food stalls with warm lighting line the left side where people sit at outdoor tables. The camera tilts up to reveal the massive NC corporate tower dominating the skyline. A person in a teal jacket takes photos while digital billboards glow on the right.

events.description: leaving the market plaza and entering the area beneath the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway through industrial corridor

entered.detail: massive concrete and metal overpass structure overhead
tall vertical screen displaying advertisements
exposed pipework and industrial machinery
dark colored car parked under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Leaving the market behind, the camera moves into a more industrial area beneath the elevated highway. The space is darker with artificial lighting, featuring exposed industrial pipes and a parked vehicle. Vertical digital billboards line the right side while the massive overpass structure looms overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with restricted access gate

events.description: approaching the no entry security checkpoint
passing through the no entry gate into the restricted zone

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through the security checkpoint gate

notable_agents.action: person standing near the gate looking at their phone

entered.detail: security gate with red illuminated no entry sign
tall metal security fencing with barbed wire
red and white striped barriers blocking the road
small guard station with lit interior

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a restricted security checkpoint marked with a glowing red 'NO ENTRY' sign. Tall security fences line both sides with road closed barriers blocking the path. A person stands near the gate looking at their phone as the camera passes through the checkpoint.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city intersection with active traffic

events.description: exiting the restricted zone onto the active city street
cars driving through the wet intersection

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the street and navigating through moving traffic

notable_agents.action: green car driving through the intersection
white car turning at the intersection

entered.detail: wet asphalt road with traffic markings
zebra crossing lines on the road
multiple cars driving through the intersection
tall street lamps illuminating the road
large building with illuminated advertisements

segments.scene_description: Exiting the restricted zone, the camera emerges onto a busy city street with active traffic. The player crosses the wet road as a green car drives through the intersection and a white car turns. Street lights and large digital billboards illuminate the area while the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked urban district that transitions from a neon-lit plaza into a restricted industrial zone before emerging onto a busy city thoroughfare. It begins by moving across wet, reflective pavement toward a security gate flanked by palm trees and glowing billboards. As the camera passes through the gate, the environment opens into a bustling market with warm food stalls, where the view tilts upward to reveal a massive corporate tower dominating the skyline. The scene then shifts into a darker, industrial space beneath an elevated highway characterized by exposed pipes and looming overpass structures, leading the camera through a restricted checkpoint marked by a glowing red no-entry sign. Finally, the camera exits the restricted zone and emerges onto a wide, active street where traffic flows through the rain under the glare of towering digital displays.
